zh.lifeSummary: 當Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor於大約0965年出生在威爾士丹比爾時，他的父親Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry33歲，母親Angharad ferch Iago18歲。他和Lleuki verch Gwerystan至少有4個兒子。他去世於1048年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor于大约0965年出生在威尔士丹比爾时，他的父亲Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry33岁，母亲Angharad ferch Iago18岁。他和Lleuki verch Gwerystan至少有4个儿子。他去世于1048年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Llywarch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional, now only occasionally used: compound of the god's name Lugu- ( see Lleu ) + Old Celtic marcos ‘horse’.

en.lifeSummary: When Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor was born about 0965, in Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry, was 33 and his mother, Angharad ferch Iago, was 18. He had at least 4 sons with Lleuki verch Gwerystan. He died in 1048, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor est né environ 0965, à Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Iago, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Lleuki verch Gwerystan. Il est décédé en 1048, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor um 0965 in Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry 33 und seine Mutter Angharad ferch Iago 18. Er hatte mit Lleuki verch Gwerystan mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1048 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor è nato il circa 0965 nel Denbighshire, Galles, il suo padre, Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Angharad ferch Iago, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Lleuki verch Gwerystan. Morì nel 1048, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevorが約0965年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestryは33歳，母Angharad ferch Iagoは18歳であった。彼はLleuki verch Gwerystanとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1048年にフランスピカーディソンメで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor(이)가 대략 0965년 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad ferch Iago(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Lleuki verch Gwerystan(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1048년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor nasceu aproximadamente 0965, em Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Angharad ferch Iago, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Lleuki verch Gwerystan. Ele faleceu em 1048, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor родился около 0965 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Iago, 18. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Lleuki verch Gwerystan. Он умер в 1048 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor nació aproximadamente 0965, en Denbighshire, Gales, su papá, Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor , Lord of Maelors and Oswestry, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Iago, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Lleuki verch Gwerystan. Murió en 1048, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 84 años.
